meta.title: Core Control Unit | Engineering & Digital Solutions
meta.description: Core Control Unit is a French software engineering company specialising in system architecture and custom digital solutions.

hero.taglineSub: We build the websites and apps your business runs on - and put your brand on billboards right across America.

services.heading: Services
services.subtitle: From websites and custom apps to billboard campaigns across America. We build it, launch it, and get your brand noticed.

items.title: Websites & Web Apps
items.description: Websites and web apps for people and businesses. We hand over all the code, or take care of hosting for you - whichever suits you best.

items.title: Billboard Advertising
items.description: Physical advertising across the United States through our own billboard network. Nationwide reach, the right locations, hard to miss.

items.title: Bots & Custom Apps
items.description: Discord and Telegram bots, plus custom desktop software built around the way you work. If it can be built, we'll build it.

items.title: Smart Contract Audit
items.description: A thorough security review of your blockchain smart contracts, with a clear report of anything that needs fixing.

items.title: Smart Contract Development
items.description: Custom blockchain smart contracts - tokens, NFTs and more - built securely from the ground up.

items.title: Web3 Integration
items.description: Connect your website or app to the blockchain, from wallet sign-in to live on-chain data, smoothly integrated.

about.heading: About
about.p1: Core Control Unit is a digital studio covering websites, custom software, and billboard advertising across the United States - with blockchain know-how on hand whenever a project calls for it.
about.p2: We work directly with individuals, startups, and small businesses. No middlemen, no bloat - just clear communication, quick turnaround, and work you fully own.
about.p3: We work remotely with clients around the world and handle each project end to end: from the first line of code to the billboard going live.

values.label: Reliability
values.desc: Built to last, not just to demo.

contact.heading: Start a project
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project. We reply within 48 hours.
contact.placeholderProject: Describe your project, your current stack, your constraints...

projects.heading: Recent projects
projects.detailSubtitle: A closer look at a few of the projects we've shipped, end to end.

items.title: US Billboard Campaign
items.description: Nationwide billboard campaign for a consumer brand: coordinated placement across 12 states, handled end-to-end from creative design to live boards.
items.longDescription: A consumer brand wanted physical presence across the US without managing a dozen regional vendors. We ran the whole campaign end-to-end: creative direction, board design, placement negotiation across 12 states, and live monitoring once boards went up. Single point of contact, one invoice, coordinated timing across every market.

items.title: E-commerce Web App
items.description: Next.js storefront with Stripe integration, custom CMS, and Vercel hosting. Delivered with full source code transfer to the client.
items.longDescription: A growing retailer needed to move off a bloated SaaS platform onto something they actually owned. We built a Next.js storefront with Stripe Checkout, a lightweight custom CMS for product and inventory management, and deployed it on Vercel. Full source code was handed over at delivery, with no vendor lock-in.

items.title: Community Discord Bot
items.description: Custom bot managing a 20k-member community: automated onboarding, moderation tools, and live event notifications. Built for a private client.
items.longDescription: A 20,000-member Discord community was outgrowing manual moderation. We built a custom bot handling automated onboarding flows, rule enforcement and moderation tooling, and live notifications for community events, tailored to how this specific community operates rather than a generic off-the-shelf bot.

legal.cookiesText: This site does not use tracking or advertising cookies. Only strictly necessary technical cookies may be set. No data is shared with third parties for advertising purposes.
